changes.value:
**File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/views-context.tsx:70,73,76`

```ts
if (event.payload.entity_type === "view") refresh();
```

Hardcodes "view" as the entity type that triggers view list refresh. Three separate event handlers all check the same hardcoded string.
